scope: Purpose-limited historical reference for Stride 2B.5 legacy item lookup state/model preparation without production Firebase connectivity.

files.notes: Exact historical Firebase blueprint. Authorizes reference to the Item entity fields and /items/{itemId} read path only.
Exact historical contiguous fragment containing Item and BluetoothTag interfaces. Firebase Timestamp types are evidence only and must not be copied into the active non-Firebase model.
Exact historical contiguous fragment showing getDoc(doc(db, 'items', id)), found/not-found handling, error handling, and loading lifecycle. Read-only reference only.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment; AI Studio must run node scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet authorizes reference to the legacy Item model, /items/{itemId} document-key semantics, and found/not-found/error/loading behavior only.
It does not authorize production Firebase configuration, authentication, Firestore access, writes, storage, migration, backfill, cross-database access, or item editing.
The active model must use runtime-neutral serializable types; do not copy Firebase Timestamp imports into active code.
Scope boundaries guide planning and reporting; acceptance should focus on a working lookup-state foundation, preserved navigation/acquisition behavior, hard data boundaries, and central verification.
